title: Profitable Home Cleaning Business | 50+ Recurring Clients | $120K Rev
reasonForSelling: I am relocating to another state.
supportTraining: We have a training program for new hires. Owner will train buyer and will ensure a smooth transition. It is a very hands-off business. All cleaning work is hired out to employees (contract 1099s).
description:
This is a rare opportunity to acquire a profitable, underpriced, well-established residential cleaning business in one of Florida's most desirable and fastest-growing markets — West Palm Beach, Palm Beach County. With over 40 loyal recurring clients, $120,000 in gross annual revenue, and a healthy 50% profit margin, this business delivers approximately $60,000 in net earnings to its owner every year. The business comes with an established LLC and operating website, linked to our business operating platform called. Please see website www.madameeco.com.

What makes this business truly special is the quality of its client base. These are not one-time customers — they are loyal, long-term recurring clients who pay consistently and reliably, week after week and month after month. Recurring revenue of this nature is the gold standard in any service business, providing the new owner with immediate, predictable cash flow from day one.
The operations are simple, lean, and easy to learn. There are no complex systems, expensive equipment, or large overhead costs eating into profits. The business runs efficiently with low fixed expenses, which is exactly why the margins are so strong. A new owner can step in quickly and comfortably, whether they are an experienced entrepreneur or a first-time business buyer looking for a manageable, rewarding operation.

The West Palm Beach market is exceptional for this type of business. Palm Beach County is experiencing tremendous population growth, with thousands of new residents relocating each month from high-tax northern states. These newcomers — professionals, retirees, and affluent families — are exactly the demographic that values and invests in professional home cleaning services. The demand here is not seasonal or trend-dependent. It is driven by lifestyle, demographics, and a permanently growing population.
